meta.description: Colombians finest — A premier fine dining experience in the heart of the city. Prime aged cuts, intimate ambiance, impeccable service.

brand.tagline: Aged to Perfection. Served with Distinction.

hero.headline: Where Every Cut Tells a Story
hero.subheadline: Prime aged steaks. Intimate ambiance. Chicago's finest table.

about.headline: Forty Years of Disciplined Obsession
body: James Sterling opened these doors in 1984 with a single conviction: that great beef, handled with patience and precision, needs no embellishment. Only time. He built Sterling & Co. not as a restaurant, but as a declaration — that Chicago deserved a table worthy of its ambition.

The kitchen runs on obsession. Each cut arrives whole, selected from ranches we have worked with for decades, then dry-aged on-premises until the enzymes have done what no sauce can replicate. The room temperature never varies. The lighting never changes. Every detail is an argument for the same point: that pleasure, at this level, is a discipline.
about.imageAlt: The Sterling & Co. dining room at dusk

items.name: Oysters Rockefeller
items.description: Six oysters, creamed spinach, house-made hollandaise, crispy pancetta.

items.name: Wagyu Carpaccio
items.description: A5 wagyu, black truffle oil, shaved parmesan, capers, grilled crostini.

items.name: French Onion Gratinée
items.description: 48-hour caramelized onion broth, gruyère, sourdough crouton.

items.name: Lobster Bisque
items.description: Maine lobster, cognac cream, chive oil, brioche croutons.

items.name: Prime Ribeye — 16oz
items.description: 28-day dry-aged, bone-in, compound herb butter, roasted garlic jus.

items.name: Filet Mignon — 8oz
items.description: USDA prime center-cut, wrapped in applewood bacon, cabernet reduction.

items.name: Tomahawk — 32oz
items.description: Dry-aged 45 days. For two. A spectacle and a meal.

items.name: New York Strip — 14oz
items.description: Prime black angus, house steak spice, béarnaise on request.

items.name: Truffle Potato Gratin
items.description: Yukon gold, black truffle cream, aged gruyère, crisp top.

items.name: Creamed Spinach
items.description: Classic Chicago style, nutmeg, heavy cream, shallots.

items.name: Roasted Wild Mushrooms
items.description: Forager's mix, thyme butter, toasted breadcrumb.

items.name: Bone Marrow Butter Rolls
items.description: House-baked, roasted bone marrow butter, fleur de sel.

items.name: Chocolate Fondant
items.description: Valrhona 70%, warm liquid center, Madagascar vanilla bean ice cream.

items.name: Crème Brûlée
items.description: Tahitian vanilla, house-torched, seasonal berry compote.

items.name: Cheese Selection
items.description: Three artisan cheeses, honeycomb, candied walnuts, membrillo.

reservations.headline: Secure Your Evening
reservations.body: We recommend reserving at least one week in advance. For parties of six or more, please contact us directly.

whatsapp.message: Hello, I'd like to make a reservation at Colombians finest.
